description: Composition:Golden heels made of PUshoe care:Rub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustFitting:Regular FitThis golden pair form catwalk is meant for the princess in every woman. With their delicate upper and ethereal matrerial, these sandals add a dash of whimsy to your entire look. Team these with a sleek dress or pants for semi formal occassions to accentuate the beauty of your feet.
